languages.text: "Вы победили богомерзкого вора?" {n}Словно не веря в услышанное, произносит Иокаста.{/n} "Что ж, на лучшее и рассчитывать было нельзя. Разве что на гибель проклятого {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеноса{/g} в придачу".

traits.locale_text: "Вы победили богомерзкого вора?" {n}Словно не веря в услышанное, произносит Иокаста.{/n} "Что ж, на лучшее и рассчитывать было нельзя. Разве что на гибель проклятого {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеноса{/g} в придачу".
traits.speaker: DisciplineMaster

languages.text: "You defeated that unholy thief?" {n}Sauerback asks, as if unable to believe what she is hearing.{/n} "Well, I couldn't have hoped for anything better. Except for the death of that accursed {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} as well."
languages.original_text: "Вы победили богомерзкого вора?" {n}Словно не веря в услышанное, произносит Иокаста.{/n} "Что ж, на лучшее и рассчитывать было нельзя. Разве что на гибель проклятого {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеноса{/g} в придачу".

traits.locale_text: "You defeated that unholy thief?" {n}Sauerback asks, as if unable to believe what she is hearing.{/n} "Well, I couldn't have hoped for anything better. Except for the death of that accursed {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} as well."

"You defeated that unholy thief?" {n}Sauerback asks, as if unable to believe what she is hearing.{/n} "Well, I couldn't have hoped for anything better. Except for the death of that accursed xenos as well."

"You defeated that unholy thief?" {n}Sauerback asks, as if unable to believe what she is hearing.{/n} "Well, I couldn't have hoped for anything better. Except for the death of that accursed xenos as well."

"You defeated that unholy thief?" {n}Sauerback asks, as if unable to believe what she is hearing.{/n} "Well, I couldn't have hoped for anything better. Except for the death of that accursed {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} as well."

languages.text: 「あの邪悪な泥棒を倒したの？」{n}ソーアバックは信じられないように問いかける。{/n}「まさか、それ以上の望みはなかった。あの 異種族の死さえも望んでいた」
languages.original_text: "You defeated that unholy thief?" {n}Sauerback asks, as if unable to believe what she is hearing.{/n} "Well, I couldn't have hoped for anything better. Except for the death of that accursed xenos as well."

traits.locale_text: 「あの邪悪な泥棒を倒したの？」ソーアバックは信じられないように問いかける。「まさか、それ以上の望みはなかったわ。あの accursed xenos の死さえも望んでいたわ。」

languages.text: «¿Ha derrotado a ese ladrón blasfemo?». {n}Sauerback pregunta, como si le costara creer lo que oye.{/n} «Bueno, es la mejor noticia que podía darnos. Excepto posiblemente si también hubiera matado al vil {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}».
languages.original_text: "You defeated that unholy thief?" {n}Sauerback asks, as if unable to believe what she is hearing.{/n} "Well, I couldn't have hoped for anything better. Except for the death of that accursed {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} as well."

traits.locale_text: «¿Ha derrotado a ese ladrón blasfemo?». {n}Sauerback pregunta, como si le costara creer lo que oye.{/n} «Bueno, es la mejor noticia que podía darnos. Excepto posiblemente si también hubiera matado al vil {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}».

languages.text: "Ihr habt diesen unheiligen Dieb besiegt?", {n}fragt Sauerback, als würde sie ihren Ohren nicht trauen.{/n} "Tja, mehr hatte ich mir nicht erhofft. Außer den Tod des verfluchten {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Monsters{/g} vielleicht."
languages.original_text: "You defeated that unholy thief?" {n}Sauerback asks, as if unable to believe what she is hearing.{/n} "Well, I couldn't have hoped for anything better. Except for the death of that accursed {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} as well."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt diesen unheiligen Dieb besiegt?", {n}fragt Sauerback, als würde sie ihren Ohren nicht trauen.{/n} "Tja, mehr hatte ich mir nicht erhofft. Außer den Tod des verfluchten {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Monsters{/g} vielleicht."

languages.text: « Vous avez vaincu ce misérable voleur ? {n}vous demande Sauerback, incapable d'en croire ses oreilles.{/n} Eh bien, je n'aurais pas pu espérer mieux. Excepté peut-être la mort de ce maudit {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g}. »
languages.original_text: "You defeated that unholy thief?" {n}Sauerback asks, as if unable to believe what she is hearing.{/n} "Well, I couldn't have hoped for anything better. Except for the death of that accursed {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} as well."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez vaincu ce misérable voleur ? {n}vous demande Sauerback, incapable d'en croire ses oreilles.{/n} Eh bien, je n'aurais pas pu espérer mieux. Excepté peut-être la mort de ce maudit {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g}. »

languages.text: “您击败了那个渎神的窃贼？”{n}苏尔贝克问道，语气中带着难以置信。{/n}“嗯，这真是一个好消息。只可惜那该死的{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}没能一并丧命。”
languages.original_text: "You defeated that unholy thief?" {n}Sauerback asks, as if unable to believe what she is hearing.{/n} "Well, I couldn't have hoped for anything better. Except for the death of that accursed {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} as well."

traits.locale_text: “您击败了那个渎神的窃贼？”{n}苏尔贝克问道，语气中带着难以置信。{/n}“嗯，这真是一个好消息。只可惜那该死的{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}没能一并丧命。”

languages.text: "O melun hırsızı yendiniz mi?" {n}Sauerback, duyduklarına inanamıyormuş gibi soruyor.{/n} "Daha iyisini umamazdım. Kahrolası {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenoların{/g} ölmesi dışında tabii."
languages.original_text: "You defeated that unholy thief?" {n}Sauerback asks, as if unable to believe what she is hearing.{/n} "Well, I couldn't have hoped for anything better. Except for the death of that accursed {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} as well."

traits.locale_text: "O melun hırsızı yendiniz mi?" {n}Sauerback, duyduklarına inanamıyormuş gibi soruyor.{/n} "Daha iyisini umamazdım. Kahrolası {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenoların{/g} ölmesi dışında tabii."
